channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumpster dumped, 15th May
item.description:
A local junky (from Sandy Hill Road 189,) stole a nearby dumpster from a shop or block of flats. He filled it with his household furniture and then dumped it across the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several traffic diversion signs on footway, 15th May
item.description:
These block ped access esp if disability.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-10, Hatfields, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bin bags, 15th May
item.description:
Two big bags have been dumped at the corner of Oakmere Road and Rutherglen Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 15th May
item.description:
Graffiti tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leonard Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked on pavement, 15th May
item.description:
Please, Japanese vehicle removed as it is parked on the pavement which is for the pedestrians not a private car park for the lazy driver

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eldon Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 15th May
item.description:
On waste collection day we often have collections of rubbish left in the street on our road after the bins have been emptied The picture is taken after the bin lorry has been and gone, and this rubbish was not in the street before

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rain has caused flooding, 15th May
item.description:
2 days of heavy downpours has caused the problem. Assume the drain is blocked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Woodside Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gum on sign, 15th May
item.description:
Gum on sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flat 26 Lissenden Mansions nw5 1pp back garden, 15th May
item.description:
There are two trees that i have grown soo much that are causing problems, they go over the disabled music centre all leaves and tree trunks are falling down in that place, they have already come few times and complained about them to be removed, and they throw everything back in my garden, also nearly hit my children, as olay in the garden, there is also a tree stump that breaking the fences down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lissenden Gardens, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bikes taking over pavement, 15th May
item.description:
Do we really need to see this every day? When are these companies taking responsibilities for their bicycle being left everywhere?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whiston Road, Haggerston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th May
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pocket Park Requires Maintenance, 15th May
item.description:
This pocket Park requires maintenance such as grass cutting and weeding.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 26 Exeter Road NW2 4SH, 15th May
item.description:
Damaged pavement trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water pooling in road. Drain blocked, 15th May
item.description:
Water pooling in road by kerb outside 36 Wickham Way after heavy rainfall.. This problem was reported a few months ago and the job status turned to completed but the work was not done. Some people in this road have reported that sewage water is coming up their toilets. So please can you fix this ASAP?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags left outside bin store, 15th May
item.description:
Black bags are consistently left outside the bin store, at least once it twice a week and usual on Friday and Saturday evenings. The foxes then open the bags and spread the rubbish everywhere. As a result this area is constantly littered.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped being done behind the gardens of 22-23 goldfinch road, 15th May
item.description:
Could Peabody please look into finding out who is fly tipping this much stuff, it occurs every month and always behind 22-23 goldfinch road for some reason

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins left on street overflowing, 15th May
item.description:
Bins left on highway overflowing. Perhaps if collections were more frequent this would be addressed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jenner Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dumpimg from flats, 15th May
item.description:
Please investigate soonest.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 371, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs trimming unable to walk, 15th May
item.description:
Tree needs trimming, hanging too low over pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downham Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several mattresses and a fridge freezer left there for a few days now, 15th May
item.description:
It’s causing an obstruction and blocking the driveway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-30, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
